---
title: "About Me"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

I'm currently finishing off my PhD at the University of Edinburgh under the supervision of [Prof. Robert Logie](http://www.ppls.ed.ac.uk/psychology/people/robert-logie), [Dr Mario Parra](http://www.hw.ac.uk/schools/life-sciences/staff-directory/mario-parra-rodriguez.htm) and [Prof. Nelson Cowan](http://www.ppls.ed.ac.uk/people/nelson-cowan).

## Aim
This is very much a work in progress. The ultimate aim is to use this site to share findings and resources (data and code).
